source: Internal ontology aligned with IEC 60909-0 + IEC 60364-4-43

node_kinds.name: HV Primary Supply
node_kinds.description: DNO supply at HV primary substation. Source of Ik"_HV. Cascade root for HV-side projects.

node_kinds.name: Transformer LV Secondary
node_kinds.description: LV side of incoming or distribution transformer. Source of Ik"_LV. Cascade root for LV-only projects.

node_kinds.name: Board Incoming Terminals
node_kinds.description: Terminals of distribution board's main switch. Ik" check for main switch breaker rating.

node_kinds.name: Board Busbar
node_kinds.description: DB busbar after main switch but before way breakers. Ipk check for busbar mechanical withstand.

node_kinds.name: Outgoing Feeder Breaker Output
node_kinds.description: Downstream of way breaker, upstream of cable feeder. Each outgoing feeder is one node.

node_kinds.name: Final Circuit End
node_kinds.description: End of branch circuit at load equipment. Lowest Ifault in cascade. ADS check uses Ik"_min here.
